action.reasoning: Observation: The training script keeps crashing with exit code 139 (segmentation fault). The main issues are: 1) In train.py, I'm calling model.set_edge_index_and_weights(adj_mx) which doesn't exist in the model. 2) The forward method expects edge_index and edge_weights as parameters but they're not being passed. 3) The model architecture is overly complex and may be causing memory issues. I need to fix the model to properly handle the graph structure and update the training script accordingly.
